name: Gladden Barrel Counter Height Barstool: Upholstered, Brass Legs, Cushioned - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your indoor seating with this Gladden Barrel Counter-Height Stool from Threshold™. This counter-height barstool with a barrel-like silhouette makes a stylish addition to your kitchen island or home bar. Upholstered in cream boucle fabric with a cushioned seat, a curved back and armrests, it will pair elegantly with your existing decor and offer a comfy sitting experience. The gold-tone brass legs in a powder-coated finish add luxe appeal, while the built-in footrails provide better balance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
